content.en:
The Red Maple Saint Realm Sacred Tablet World had no effect on Ye Tian, so Ye Tian was out of the customs and returned to the Battle Ancestor Realm.

He inquired, and the date of the opening of the Holy Soul Realm had not yet been decided.

After all, for the Saint Gate's peerless domain ancestors and even the ancestors, tens of millions or even hundreds of millions of years were not much time, just a nap time.

In this way, millions of years passed, and the day of the opening of the Holy Soul Realm was finally set.

"Eight million years later!"

This is the time set now.

At this time, the Ten Great Holy Gates and a few Holy Lands were all preparing to send some Supreme Domain Ancestors into them, but in fact, many Holy Lands were reluctant to send people in, because once the disciples fell, the losses would be heavy.

And the possibility of such a fall is still very high.

Although there are countless opportunities in the Holy Soul Realm, if you can't survive, no matter how many opportunities you get, it's useless!

Therefore, those holy places do not force disciples to enter the Holy Soul Realm, if there are really disciples who want to enter, they will give them a quota, if they don't want to enter, then they will not enter.

Of course, if you're lucky, you can get a lot of money.

But the likelihood of such good luck is too low!

In the blink of an eye, eight million years have passed.

On this day, the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor informed Ye Tian and the other Supreme Domain Ancestors that the Holy Soul Realm had opened.

Battle Ancestral Realm, an entrance to the world.

A huge warship docked here, and when Ye Tian came here, he felt the terrifying aura transmitted from the warship, and the whole person was like a mortal facing a terrifying desolate beast.

"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, this is our battle gate's emperor-level warship, the Qinglong Ship, the power of this warship alone can reach the level of one step invincible domain ancestor. It is a warship refined by the ancestors, and it is said to be forged from the bones of non-superior creatures, thus leaving a trace of the coercion of the ancestors of the unsurpassed domains!"

The herring fish domain ancestor introduced.

"I see!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Whoa!!

A Famous Supreme Domain Ancestor flew into this warship, and Ye Tian also entered the warship.

They needed to use this Blue Dragon Ship to go to the Primordial Ancestral Realm.

The place where the Primordial Ancestral Realm is located is not an ordinary place, but a very dangerous forbidden place, even an ordinary invincible domain ancestor has no way to go to the Primordial Ancestral Realm, and he will accidentally fall in the forbidden land.

Therefore, these Supreme Domain Ancestors could not fly to the Primordial Ancestral Realm at all, and if they took the Blue Dragon Boat, they could easily reach the Primordial Ancestral Realm.

This time, there are a total of thousands of Supreme Domain Ancestors in the Battle Gate who went to the Primordial Ancestral Realm, and every Supreme Domain Ancestor is a leader, but so many Supreme Domain Ancestors have entered the Primordial Ancestral Realm, I am afraid that many of them will fall, not only in the Holy Soul Realm, but also from the dangers of other forces.

In the Holy Soul Realm, without restraint, I am afraid that the Supreme Domain Ancestors will often fight with each other, so if their strength is not good, they will definitely fight each other when they encounter the Supreme Domain Ancestors of other forces.

Blue Dragon ship.

The Supreme Domain Ancestors sat cross-legged one by one, and suddenly heard the voice of the Fire Emblem War Ancestor.

"After entering the Holy Soul Realm, you must pay attention to the Supreme Domain Ancestors of the four Holy Gates, namely the Forbidden Holy Gate, the Dark Holy Gate, the Holy Gate of All Things, and the Firmament Holy Gate, once you encounter the strongest domain ancestors of these four Holy Gates, everything that can be killed will be killed, and the disciples of the other Holy Gates must also beware, you must not fight with each other, understand?"

"Yes, Lord Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor!"

Many Supreme Domain Ancestors nodded and said.

Soon, the ancestors of the strongest domain of the Battle Gate crossed a long distance on the green dragon ship and entered a forbidden place in the Dark Sanctuary, the primordial forbidden land.

This primordial forbidden land contains terrifying killing machines, when the Qinglong ship enters here, countless killing machines bombard the Qinglong ship, but they are all resisted by the Qinglong ship.

It didn't take long for the Blue Dragon Ship to enter the central area of the forbidden land.

Here, a safe area has already been carved out by the ancestors.

Soon, Ye Tian and the others flew out of the Qinglong boat and landed in this safe area.

"Is that the Primordial Ancestral Realm?"

Ye Tian looked at an incomparably huge world in the distance, this world was even bigger than the Battle Ancestor Realm, and it was naturally the Primordial Ancestral Realm.

However, this Primordial Ancestral Realm was filled with three rifts, and these three rifts ran through the entire Primordial Ancestral Realm, and fortunately, the Primordial Ancestral Realm was strong enough that it did not disintegrate.

The aura of the Primordial Ancestral Realm is much stronger than that of the Battle Ancestral Realm, and the aura is extremely violent, giving people a very huge pressure.

And.

The Primordial Ancestral Realm didn't seem to have any entrances, and it didn't even allow the Divine Sense to explore.

Ye Tian's divine sense extended and was blocked by a terrifying force, this power seemed to be beyond his cognitive scope, I am afraid that even a single step of the invincible domain ancestor would be difficult to tear this power.

"I'm afraid that only if there is no superior domain ancestor, or even the first ancestor, can we be sent in!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The Battle Gate is not the first force to enter here, and several other Holy Gates have already arrived.

Subsequently, several more Holy Gate Domain Ancestors arrived.

Then, the Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Holy Land were also escorted here by their Superior Domain Ancestors, but some of the Holy Lands were not qualified to enter here.

It has only been a few years before all the forces have come together.

"Let's turn it on!"

A peerless domain ancestor spoke.

Everyone's tone is very bad, after all, they are afraid that they have all fought not long ago, and even some forces have fallen a lot of domain ancestors, who will have a good tone?

Abrupt.

A huge claw comparable to a small domain realm emerged, tearing through the invisible barrier outside the primordial ancestral realm.

When this claw appeared, those Peerless Domain Ancestors looked solemn one by one, and they all retreated, for fear of being affected.

"Ancestor!"

The thought came to everyone's minds.

Only the Ancestor has such terrifying strength, and the other party should not be the Ancestor of humanoid creatures.

"The ancestor of the Forbidden Holy Gate!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Then, another Ancestor made a move, and the other party broke through the world barrier of the Primordial Ancestor Realm with one finger.

Then, a rod was directly inserted into the Primordial Ancestral Realm, forming a channel that connected to the Holy Soul Realm of the Primordial Ancestral Realm.

"Let these juniors in!"

Voices filled with supreme majesty.

This is the voice of the first parents.

"Yes!"

Many of the Superior Domain Ancestors responded one after another.

Before Ye Tian could react, a terrifying force carried him through the passage and entered the Holy Soul Realm.
